name: xsolla
description: Reads Xsolla merchant transaction search/registry, payouts, payout currency breakdown, and financial report data, and writes full/partial transaction refunds through the Xsolla Pay Station API.

risk.read: external Xsolla merchant API read of transaction, payout, and financial report data
risk.write: external mutation: issues full or partial refunds to end users for completed transactions
risk.approval: required for all write actions (request_refund, request_partial_refund); reads require none
